title: Jay's Cobblemon
description: A modified version of the Official Cobblemon Fabric Modpack made for personal use.
body:
A modified version of the [Official Cobblemon Fabric Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) made for personal use.

This modpack is based around the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod which adds Pokemon, as well as many items and blocks to Vanilla Minecraft. Journey through Minecraft with your partner by your side, and perhaps capture even more throughout your adventure.

Some of the mods added include [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), for use with the [PokeAstra](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1161061736951058573) datapack.

Recommended to run with a minimum of 3 GB of memory. Use 4 GB or more for best performance.

You can modify this modpack as you wish since i don't own any of the assets of course, but I recommend getting each mod from their original pages to support their creators.
- Credits to every mod creator, and especially the Cobblemon Team for most of the assets used in this, including the modpack icon, the title screen and many more.
- Ultimon: Credits to every creator involved with the datapack, including but not only:
MoreMons (by Bruno22), Buizel and Floatzel (by spenny), HiddenMons (by LegenTM), DeCube's MoMonsPack (by DeCube), BattleBond Pack (by GenotypeXD), PigeonPack (by El Pigeon), SpencyRock, Spoon and Frank the Farmer for fixing bugs during compilation and development of UltiMon's assets.
- The distribution of this modifed modpack also abides by the MPL-2.0 license.
